title: 3D Spears+
body:
## 🗡️ 3D Spears Resource Pack

Replaces flat spears with fully 3D models
Works in Survival, PvP & Multiplayer

![1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c8643b4c5cfc5b981d8adf9b014cce75fa1a02b5_0.webp)

Transform your combat experience with **high-quality 3D spears** crafted for realism, immersion, and smooth gameplay. This pack replaces flat item models with **fully modeled 3D spears**, giving Minecraft combat a more intense and medieval feel.

✨ **Features**
- Fully modeled **3D spear designs**
- Clean, sharp textures with smooth detailing
- Vanilla-friendly look that fits naturally in-game
- Perfect for **PvP, Survival, and RPG servers**
- Lightweight & **performance-friendly**
- No gameplay changes — **visual upgrade only**

⚔️ Ideal for players who want a **realistic medieval weapon experience** without sacrificing performance.

---

⌚ Community Download Goal : 1000 — every download helps ❤️

---

## 📥 Installation Guide

1. Download the **3D Spears Resource Pack (.zip)**
2. Open Minecraft and go to  
   **Options → Resource Packs → Open Pack Folder**
3. Move the `.zip` file into the **resourcepacks** folder
4. Go back to Minecraft and **enable the pack**
5. Click **Done** and enjoy your new 3D spears!

---

## 🧩 Supported Version
- **Minecraft 26.1**
- **Minecraft 1.21.11**

---

## 🧾 Credits
- **Made by Pushkraj**
- **You are NOT allowed to copy or reuse these assets in other packs**

---

Enjoy enhanced combat with immersive 3D spears ⚔️

### 💾 Download now and upgrade your combat visuals
